title: Create Boards from Templates via API
excerpt:

posts.author: b.schwarzwald (Barbara Schwarzwald [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear monday.com developers,

I’m reaching out to request additional endpoints to the API, specifically concerning board management. We would like to be able to create Boards based on Templates via the API, but are limited by the current endpoint options.

We think this would be valuable addition to the roadmap and look forward to any updates or feedback on this request.

Cheers
Barbara

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @b.schwarzwald,

You can create boards from templates using the template_id field as shown here

Is that what you wanted to request?

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Cheers,
Matias
